daily_take.headline: Giants Crush Nats at 94.5%. The Market Just Priced in a Blowout.
daily_take.deck: The Giants jumped 36 points overnight to 94.5%, signaling sharp money sees a mismatch the books missed. At this price, you're getting single-digit implied upset odds on a divisional game where nothing has fundamentally changed since yesterday. The move reeks of algorithm frontrunning or a late injury report. Either way, 94.5% feels like the market overshot. Smart bettors are now leaning the Nationals as the contrarian fade, or staying out entirely until the books correct.
